[[Jane Mason]] |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |release date=[[February]] [[1998]] {{C|First printing}}''Star Wars Kids'' 8 |subscribers=[[April]] 1998 {{C|Release}}''Star Wars Kids'' 8 was released packaged with ''[[Star Wars Missions 8: Togorian Trap]]'', for which the [[StarWars.com]] Cargo Bay [https://web.archive.org/web/20040803144738/http://cargobay.starwars.com/webapps/cargobay/item-detail/655 listed] a release date of [[April]] [[1998]]. ''Togorian Trap'' additionally denotes an [[April]] 1998 release date. |pages=26 |isbn=0-590-02337-3 |issn= |genre= |issue=8 |series=[[Star Wars Kids (1997)|''Star Wars Kids'' (1997)]] }} '''''Star Wars Kids'' 8''' is the eighth issue [[Star Wars Kids (1997)|''Star Wars Kids'']] magazine. It was published by [[Scholastic]] and released in [[April]] [[1998]]. Issue 8 included part three of the serial [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] ''[[X-Wing Marks the Spot]]'', written by [[Mike W. Barr]]. ''Star Wars Kids'' 8 was available exclusively to subscribers of Scholastic's ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' young-reader series and [[roleplaying game]], which arrived as monthly continuity packages via direct mail. Each package included a new ''Star Wars Kids'' magazine issue and the latest ''Star Wars Missions'' adventure book. ''Star Wars Kids'' 8 came packaged with the game's eighth adventure book, [[Star Wars Missions 8: Togorian Trap|''Togorian Trap'']]. {{Magazine-stub|issue}} ==Contents== ===Features=== *'''"[[Who Is That Alien?]] Ithorians & Gamorreans"''' by [[Bill Smith]] *'''"[[Ask R2-D2 About the Prequels|Ask R2-D2 About The Prequels]]"''' by [[Scott Chernoff]] *'''"[[Meet...|Meet C-3PO!]]"''' by [[Scott Chernoff]] *:Anthony Daniels is the galaxy's favorite golden droid. *'''"[[Star Wars Kids Feature Planet]] (Actually, This Time It's A Moon): Yavin 4"''' by [[Terry Ray Hiller]] *:Where On Earth Is A Place Like Yavin 4? *'''"Who Does That?"''' *:The Real Life Jobs of Movie Making *'''"Space Science"''' by [[Terry Ray Hiller]] *:NEBULAE: See Where Stars are Born *'''"[[X-Wing Marks the Spot|''X-Wing Marks the Spot, Part 3'']]"''' by [[Mike W. Barr]] ===Departments=== *'''"A-maze-ing Universe"''' *'''"''Star Wars Missions'' Bonus Page"''' *'''"Brain Blasters"''' *:...For the ultimate ''Star Wars'' fan. *'''"Yoda's Puzzle Pages"''' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{KidsNav|7|9}} {{Interlang |fi=Star Wars Kids 8 }} [[Category:Star Wars Kids (1997) issues|08]]
